title: SG8 5HE, Johnson Matthey plc: environmental permit  issued – EPR/BT7086IJ/V017
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit and decision document for:   Operator name: Johnson Matthey plc Installation name: Royston Site Permit number: EPR/BT7086IJ  "
